command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000), @resultCode varchar(33), @resultName nvarchar(511) &CommandWhenBeforeLoad; select @resultCode = rtrim(ma_kq), @resultName = case when @@language = 'V' then rtrim(ten_kq) else rtrim(ten_kq2) end from hrdmkq where ma_kq = '1' select @message = 'this._resultCode = ''' + @resultCode + ''';this._resultName = ''' + replace(replace(isnull(@resultName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);active$PITestResult(this);' select isnull(@message,'') as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) &CommandWhenBeforeLoad; select @message = 'set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);scatter$PITestResult(this);' select isnull(@message,'') as message return

declare @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$exists nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Nội dung phỏng vấn %s1 và ngày %s2 đã có hoặc lồng nhau hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The interview code %s1 and date %s2 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Bản ghi này được chuyển từ phân hệ khác sang, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete this record, It was inserted automatically.' end

declare @d nvarchar(10) if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_pv = @ma_pv and isnull(ngay_pv, '') = isnull(@ngay_pv, '') and tag = 0) begin select @d = case when @ngay_pv is not null then convert(char(10), @ngay_pv, 103) else '/ /' end select 'ma_pv' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_pv)), '%s2', rtrim(@d)) as message return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @stt_rec0 = max(stt_rec0), @line_nbr = max(line_nbr) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @stt_rec0 = '000', @line_nbr = 0
exec dbo.FastBusiness$HRM$GetRowID @stt_rec0 output, @line_nbr output select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID, @tag = 0

declare @d nvarchar(10) if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0 and ma_pv = @ma_pv and isnull(ngay_pv, '') = isnull(@ngay_pv, '') and tag = 0) begin select @d = case when @ngay_pv is not null then convert(char(10), @ngay_pv, 103) else '/ /' end select 'ma_pv' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_pv)), '%s2', rtrim(@d)) as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and tag = 0
if exists(select 1 from hrepv where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and tag = 1) begin select @$deleteConflict as message return end
